Area Forecast Discussion
National Weather Service New York NY
235 PM EDT Sat Jun 13 2026

.SYNOPSIS...
Quiet weather; temperatures near normal through the period with high
pressure in control. No significant forecast challenges; models
are in good agreement and confidence is high. Highs tomorrow will be
close to seasonal averages with light winds and ample sunshine.

.NEAR TERM /THROUGH TONIGHT/...
Clear skies overnight with light winds. Lows near normal.
